productDisplayName: Spice Art Women Beads Red Clutch
description: Look your glamorous best with this spice art clutch, customised for the ethnic diva in you. Show off your traditional side with this piece, which is as functional as it is fashionable. Width: 23 cm Height: 10 cm Made of raw silk with a nylon inner lining Stone embellishment on the flap that has a magnetic clasp One main compartment with a magnetic clasp A zippered compartment inside the main compartment Care Wipe surface with a damp clean cloth
